plan.rationale: unit: Validate core logic (calculate_discount, paginate) and data invariants via tests/test_app.py; exposes known bugs (division by zero, pagination off-by-one). Integration-style endpoint tests in tests/test_api.py are excluded per manifest (integration disabled). security: Perform SAST on app.py (e.g., detect SQL-injection-like string concatenation in /search) and run a dependency vulnerability audit at the project root. API/browser/integration are disabled in the manifest.

findings.recommendation: In calculate_discount, guard against quantity == 0 to prevent ZeroDivisionError. Add input validation and define behavior per spec/test (e.g., return 0.0 for zero quantity or raise a ValueError). Also add tests for zero and negative quantities.

findings.recommendation: Add a precondition check in calculate_discount to handle quantity == 0 before dividing. Decide and document expected behavior (return 0.0 or raise a ValueError), and extend unit tests to cover zero/negative quantities.
